debug_info.goal:
nums : List ℤ
h_precond : longestConsecutive_precond nums
⊢ longestConsecutive_postcond nums (longestConsecutive nums h_precond) h_precond

failed_attempts:
unfold longestConsecutive_postcond
  constructor
  · intro hnil
    subst hnil
    simp [longestConsecutive, longestConsecutive_precond]
  · intro hne
    exfalso
    exact hne rfl
  -- !benchmark @end proof

unfold longestConsecutive_postcond
  by_cases h : nums = []
  · subst h
    simp [longestConsecutive, longestConsecutive_precond]
  · simp [h]

classical
  unfold longestConsecutive_postcond
  by_cases h : nums = []
  · subst h
    simp [longestConsecutive, longestConsecutive_precond]
  · have : nums ≠ [] := h
    simp [this]
  -- !benchmark @end proof

classical
  unfold longestConsecutive_postcond
  by_cases h : nums = []
  · subst h
    simp [longestConsecutive, longestConsecutive_precond]
  ·
    have : True := trivial
    simp [h, this]
  -- !benchmark @end proof

unfold longestConsecutive_postcond
  by_cases h : nums = []
  · subst h
    simp [longestConsecutive]
  · simp [h]
  -- !benchmark @end proof

classical
  by_cases h : nums = []
  · subst h
    simp [longestConsecutive, longestConsecutive_postcond]
  · simp [longestConsecutive_postcond, h]
  -- !benchmark @end proof

classical
  by_cases h : nums = []
  · subst h
    simp [longestConsecutive, longestConsecutive_postcond]
  ·
    simp [longestConsecutive_postcond, h]
  -- !benchmark @end proof

classical
  by_cases h : nums = []
  · subst h
    simp [longestConsecutive_postcond, longestConsecutive, isConsecutive]
  ·
    have : (nums ≠ []) := h
    simp [longestConsecutive_postcond, this, h]
  -- !benchmark @end proof

classical
  by_cases h : nums = []
  · subst h
    simp [longestConsecutive_postcond, longestConsecutive, longestConsecutive_precond]
  ·
    have : (List.range nums.length |>.flatMap (fun start =>
        List.range (nums.length - start + 1) |>.map (fun len =>
          nums.mergeSort.extract start (start + len))) |>.filter isConsecutive |>.map (·.length)).contains
        (longestConsecutive nums h_precond) ∧
      (List.range nums.length |>.flatMap (fun start =>
        List.range (nums.length - start + 1) |>.map (fun len =>
          nums.mergeSort.extract start (start + len))) |>.filter isConsecutive |>.map (·.length)).all
        (· ≤ longestConsecutive nums h_precond) := by
      simp
    refine And.intro ?_ ?_
    · intro hn
      cases (hn h)
    · intro _
      simpa [longestConsecutive_postcond, h, this]
  -- !benchmark @end proof

classical
  by_cases h : nums = []
  · subst h
    simp [longestConsecutive, longestConsecutive_postcond]
  · have : nums ≠ [] := h
    simp [longestConsecutive_postcond, this]
  -- !benchmark @end proof

    subst hnil

    subst h0

    have : False := by
      simp [longestConsecutive_precond, h] at h_precond
